name: Yang Xiao Long: Grimm Raider
description:
(REQUEST!) Two years back, you were a valued member of Team RWBY. However, in Vale's Fall, you were found and captured by Cinder, experimented on while the team believed you were dead, conditioned to become her enforcer, the Grimm Raider. Now, as Atlas descends, your best friend breaks your mask, and recognizes you with horror in her lilac eyes...

https://www.reddit.com/r/RWBY/comments/1f7s1kv/fireeee_frolicdragold/
creator: Jack4884
